candidates.why: Direct total current assets line on the balance sheet; exactly matches ACT definition.

candidates.row_label: Trade receivables and other current assets
candidates.why: Current asset component only, not total current assets.
Non-current assets, wrong section for ACT.

variables.notes: Selected the reported total current assets line.

candidates.why: Direct balance-sheet cash line, matches CHE exactly.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at end of period
candidates.why: Cash flow statement ending cash, but CHE should come from balance sheet when available.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at start of period
candidates.why: Beginning cash, not the balance-sheet period-end cash target.

variables.notes: Used the balance sheet cash balance.

candidates.why: Direct total current liabilities line on the balance sheet; best match for LCT.
Only one component of current liabilities, not the total.

variables.notes: Selected the reported total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Clean current debt total and excludes lease wording; better than component/supplemental rows when present.
Valid short-term debt label, but may be only part of current debt in some years.
Current portion of long-term debt; useful fallback but supplemental and may overlap with current borrowings total.

variables.notes: Chose a clean current interest-bearing debt total outside the shortlist. Excludes lease liabilities and avoids double counting versus 'Short-Term Debt & Notes Payable' and 'LT Debt Within 1 Year'.

candidates.why: Direct match to taxes payable/current tax liabilities.
Only balance-sheet line explicitly covering property and PPE; best available proxy for total PPE.

variables.notes: Best available balance-sheet PPE line. It appears to combine investment property and PPE, but is the closest reported total tangible fixed-asset measure.

candidates.why: Direct total assets line, exact match for AT.

candidates.row_label: Net cash flow from operating activities
candidates.why: Exact operating cash flow total line on the cash flow statement.

final_choice.row_label: Net cash flow from operating activities
